visual_description: A woman with long, dark, curly hair, wearing a red and black patterned sleeveless dress, leans over a man lying on a white couch. The man, wearing glasses and an orange collared shirt, holds a cigar in his right hand and looks up at her. The woman places her left hand on his chest and smiles at him.
audio_description: A loud, sustained, high-pitched electronic tone, similar to a siren or alarm, is audible throughout the clip.
